en.question: All flowers are plants. Which conclusion follows?
en.explanation: Flowers subset plants, so some plants are flowers.

hi.question: सभी फूल पौधे। कौन-सा निष्कर्ष?

en.question: All students girls. Some girls intelligent. Conclusion: All students intelligent.
en.explanation: Intelligent girls may not include students. Does not follow.

hi.question: सभी छात्र लड़कियाँ। कुछ लड़कियाँ बुद्धिमान। निष्कर्ष?
hi.explanation: बुद्धिमान लड़कियों में छात्र शामिल नहीं हो सकते।

en.question: Some papers pens. All pens books. No book pencil. I. Some papers books. II. No pen pencil.
en.explanation: Papers that are pens are books (I). All pens are books, no book is pencil, so no pen is pencil (II). Both.

hi.question: कुछ कागज पेन। सभी पेन किताब। कोई किताब पेंसिल नहीं। I,II?

en.question: All birds animals. Some animals can fly. I. All birds fly. II. Some birds fly.
en.explanation: Birds subset animals. Flying animals may not include birds. Neither follows.

hi.question: सभी पक्षी जानवर। कुछ जानवर उड़ सकते। I,II?

en.question: Every student passed. Ravi is in class. Conclusion: Ravi passed.
en.explanation: If all passed, Ravi passed. Follows logically.

hi.question: सभी छात्र पास। रवि कक्षा में। निष्कर्ष: रवि पास।
hi.explanation: सभी पास तो रवि भी पास।

en.question: All squares rectangles. All rectangles quadrilaterals. I. All squares quadrilaterals. II. Some quadrilaterals squares.
en.explanation: Transitivity gives I. If squares exist, some quadrilaterals are squares (II). Both.

hi.question: सभी वर्ग आयत। सभी आयत चतुर्भुज। I,II?

en.question: Some dogs cats. No cat mouse. All mice rats. I. Some dogs not mice. II. Some rats not cats.
en.explanation: Dogs that are cats are not mice (I). Mice are rats, no cat is mouse, so some rats are not cats (II). Both.

hi.question: कुछ कुत्ते बिल्ली। कोई बिल्ली चूहा नहीं। सभी चूहे चूहे। I,II?

en.question: All teachers graduates. Some graduates post-graduates. I. All teachers PG. II. Some teachers may be PG.
en.explanation: I doesn't follow. II is possible, follows.

hi.question: सभी शिक्षक स्नातक। कुछ स्नातक स्नातकोत्तर। I,II?

en.question: Statement: All that glitters is not gold. Conclusion: Some glittering things are not gold.
en.explanation: The statement itself says not all glittering is gold, so some are not gold. Follows.

hi.question: चमकने वाली हर चीज़ सोना नहीं। निष्कर्ष: कुछ चमकने वाली चीज़ें सोना नहीं।

en.question: Statement: Honesty is the best policy. Conclusion: Dishonesty leads to failure.
en.explanation: Statement says honesty is best, but doesn't claim dishonesty leads to failure. Does not follow.

hi.question: ईमानदारी सबसे अच्छी नीति। निष्कर्ष: बेईमानी विफलता लाती है।

en.question: All A are B. Some B are C. Conclusion: Some A are C.
en.explanation: A subset B. Some B are C, but A may not be part of that some. Does not follow.

hi.question: सभी A,B। कुछ B,C। निष्कर्ष: कुछ A,C।
hi.explanation: A और C का संबंध निश्चित नहीं।

en.question: No A is B. All C are A. I. No C is B. II. Some C are B.
en.explanation: C subset A, A∩B=∅, so C∩B=∅. No C is B (I). II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कोई A,B नहीं। सभी C,A। I. कोई C,B नहीं। II. कुछ C,B।

en.question: Statement: Hard work is key to success. Conclusion: Lazy people never succeed.
en.explanation: Hard work is key but not the ONLY key. Lazy people could succeed by other means. Does not follow.

hi.question: कड़ी मेहनत सफलता की कुंजी। निष्कर्ष: आलसी कभी सफल नहीं होते।
hi.explanation: अन्य कारणों से भी सफलता संभव।

en.question: Some men are doctors. All doctors are graduates. I. Some men are graduates.
en.explanation: Some men→doctors→graduates. Some men are graduates (I).

hi.question: कुछ पुरुष डॉक्टर। सभी डॉक्टर स्नातक। I. कुछ पुरुष स्नातक।

en.question: Statement: Smoking causes cancer. Ram smokes. Conclusion: Ram will get cancer.
en.explanation: Causes don't guarantee effect. Ram may or may not get cancer. Does not follow definitively.

hi.question: धूम्रपान कैंसर का कारण। राम धूम्रपान करता। निष्कर्ष: राम को कैंसर होगा।

en.question: All cups are plates. Some plates are saucers. I. Some cups are saucers. II. All saucers are plates.
en.explanation: I doesn't follow (cups may not overlap saucers). II doesn't follow (reverse not true). Neither.

hi.question: सभी कप प्लेट। कुछ प्लेट तश्तरी। I,II?

en.question: No dog is cat. Some cats are pets. I. Some pets are not dogs.
en.explanation: Some cats are pets, no dog is cat. Those pets that are cats are not dogs. Some pets are not dogs (I).

hi.question: कोई कुत्ता बिल्ली नहीं। कुछ बिल्लियाँ पालतू। I. कुछ पालतू कुत्ते नहीं।

en.question: Statement: India is a developing country. Conclusion: All Indians are poor.
en.explanation: Developing country doesn't mean all citizens are poor. Does not follow.

hi.question: भारत विकासशील देश। निष्कर्ष: सभी भारतीय गरीब।
hi.explanation: विकासशील का अर्थ सब गरीब नहीं।

en.question: Some fruits are sweet. All sweet are tasty. I. Some fruits are tasty. II. All tasty are sweet.
en.explanation: Some fruits→sweet→tasty. Some fruits are tasty (I). II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कुछ फल मीठे। सभी मीठे स्वादिष्ट। I,II?

en.question: Statement: Education is important. Conclusion: Everyone should go to college.
en.explanation: Education important ≠ everyone must go to college. Many forms of education exist. Does not follow.

hi.question: शिक्षा महत्वपूर्ण। निष्कर्ष: सभी को कॉलेज जाना चाहिए।

en.question: All pens are pencils. Some pencils are erasers. I. Some pens may be erasers.
en.explanation: Some pens may be erasers is a possibility (may be). In statement-conclusion, possibilities may be considered. Only I follows.

hi.question: सभी पेन पेंसिल। कुछ पेंसिल इरेज़र। I. कुछ पेन इरेज़र हो सकते हैं।
hi.explanation: I संभव है, अनुसरण करता है।

en.question: Statement: Water boils at 100°C at sea level. Conclusion: Water in Shimla boils at 100°C.
en.explanation: Shimla is at high altitude, lower pressure, boiling point is lower. Does not follow.

hi.question: समुद्र तल पर पानी 100°C पर उबलता। निष्कर्ष: शिमला में पानी 100°C पर उबलता।
hi.explanation: ऊँचाई पर क्वथनांक कम होता है।

en.question: All A are B. No B is C. I. No A is C. II. Some A are C.
en.explanation: A subset B, B∩C=∅. No A is C (I). II doesn't.

hi.question: सभी A,B। कोई B,C नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: Exercise keeps you fit. Mohan never exercises. Conclusion: Mohan is unfit.
en.explanation: Not exercising increases probability but doesn't guarantee unfitness. Other factors like diet matter.

hi.question: व्यायाम फिट रखता। मोहन व्यायाम नहीं करता। निष्कर्ष: मोहन अनफिट।

en.question: Some A are B. All B are C. No C is D. I. Some A are not D. II. Some A are D.
en.explanation: Some A→B→C. No C is D. Those A that are B are C and not D. So Some A are not D (I). II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कुछ A,B। सभी B,C। कोई C,D नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: It rained yesterday. Conclusion: The ground is wet.
en.explanation: Rain usually wets ground but covered areas may remain dry. Not necessarily.

hi.question: कल बारिश हुई। निष्कर्ष: ज़मीन गीली है।
hi.explanation: ढकी जगह सूखी हो सकती है।

en.question: All actors are dancers. Some dancers are singers. I. Some actors are singers.
en.explanation: Actors subset dancers. Singers overlap dancers. Actors may not overlap singers. Cannot be determined.

hi.question: सभी कलाकार नर्तक। कुछ नर्तक गायक। I. कुछ कलाकार गायक।

en.question: Statement: Fast food is unhealthy. Conclusion: Pizza is unhealthy.
options: Follows, if pizza is fast food
en.explanation: If pizza is considered fast food, conclusion follows. Otherwise not.

hi.question: फास्ट फूड अस्वस्थ। निष्कर्ष: पिज़्ज़ा अस्वस्थ।
hi.explanation: यदि पिज़्ज़ा फास्ट फूड तो अनुसरण।

en.question: All M are N. All N are O. Some O are P. I. All M are O. II. Some M may be P.
en.explanation: M⊂N⊂O. All M are O (I). II: Some O are P. M may be in that P group. Possibility, follows? In strict logic, only definite conclusions. Only I follows.

hi.question: सभी M,N। सभी N,O। कुछ O,P। I,II?

en.question: Statement: A is B's brother. B is C's sister. Conclusion: A is C's brother.
en.explanation: A is male (brother of B). B is female (sister of C). So A and B are siblings. C is also B's sibling. So A and C are siblings. But A could be C's brother or sister? A is male (brother), so A is C's brother. Follows.

hi.question: A,B का भाई। B,C की बहन। निष्कर्ष: A,C का भाई।
hi.explanation: A,C भाई-बहन, A पुरुष तो भाई। अनुसरण।

en.question: Some books are novels. All novels are fiction. I. Some books are fiction.
en.explanation: Some books→novels→fiction. Some books are fiction.

hi.question: कुछ किताबें उपन्यास। सभी उपन्यास काल्पनिक। I. कुछ किताबें काल्पनिक।

en.question: Statement: Every mother loves her child. Sita is a mother. Conclusion: Sita loves her child.
en.explanation: Universal statement applied to specific case. Follows logically.

hi.question: हर माँ अपने बच्चे से प्यार करती। सीता माँ है। निष्कर्ष: सीता अपने बच्चे से प्यार करती।

en.question: No A is B. Some B are C. All C are D. I. Some D are not A. II. Some A are D.
en.explanation: Some B are C, C⊂D. Those D that are C are B. No A is B. So those D are not A. Some D are not A (I). II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कोई A,B नहीं। कुछ B,C। सभी C,D। I,II?

en.question: Statement: It is Wednesday today. Conclusion: Tomorrow is Thursday.
en.explanation: Wednesday is followed by Thursday. Follows.

hi.question: आज बुधवार। निष्कर्ष: कल गुरुवार।

en.question: All X are Y. No Y is Z. I. No X is Z. II. Some Z are X.
en.explanation: X⊂Y, Y∩Z=∅. No X is Z (I).

hi.question: सभी X,Y। कोई Y,Z नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: Children who watch TV get lower grades. Ram watches TV 4 hours daily. Conclusion: Ram gets low grades.
en.explanation: Correlation ≠ causation. Ram may still get good grades. Does not follow definitively.

hi.question: TV देखने वाले बच्चों के कम अंक। राम 4 घंटे TV देखता। निष्कर्ष: राम के कम अंक।

en.question: No river is ocean. All Ganga are rivers. I. No Ganga is ocean.
en.explanation: Ganga⊂rivers, rivers∩oceans=∅. No Ganga is ocean (I).

hi.question: कोई नदी महासागर नहीं। सभी गंगा नदी। I. कोई गंगा महासागर नहीं।

en.question: Statement: Some birds can fly. Penguin is a bird. Conclusion: Penguin can fly.
en.explanation: Only some birds fly. Penguin may not be in that some. Does not follow.

hi.question: कुछ पक्षी उड़ सकते। पेंगुइन पक्षी। निष्कर्ष: पेंगुइन उड़ सकता।

en.question: All A are B. Some B are C. I. Some C are B.
en.explanation: Some B are C converts to Some C are B. Follows.

hi.question: सभी A,B। कुछ B,C। I. कुछ C,B।

en.question: Statement: In a code, DELHI=EFMIJ. Conclusion: MUMBAI=NVNCBJ.
en.explanation: Each letter +1. M+1=N, U+1=V, M+1=N, B+1=C, A+1=B, I+1=J. NVNCBJ. Follows.

hi.question: DELHI=EFMIJ। निष्कर्ष: MUMBAI=NVNCBJ।

en.question: Statement: 2 is an even number. Conclusion: 2 is divisible by 2.
en.explanation: Even numbers are divisible by 2. Follows.

hi.question: 2 सम संख्या। निष्कर्ष: 2, 2 से विभाज्य।

en.question: All fruits are healthy. Some healthy foods are expensive. I. Some fruits are expensive.
en.explanation: Fruits⊂healthy. Expensive healthy foods may not include fruits. Does not follow.

hi.question: सभी फल स्वस्थ। कुछ स्वस्थ भोजन महँगे। I. कुछ फल महँगे।
hi.explanation: फलों का महँगे से संबंध निश्चित नहीं।

en.question: Some A are B. No B is C. All C are D. I. Some A are not C. II. Some B are D.
en.explanation: Some A are B, no B is C → those A are not C → Some A are not C (I). II: No B is C, C⊂D → B may or may not be D. Only I.

hi.question: कुछ A,B। कोई B,C नहीं। सभी C,D। I,II?

en.question: Statement: Ram is older than Shyam. Shyam is older than Mohan. Conclusion: Ram is older than Mohan.
en.explanation: Transitivity: Ram>Shyam>Mohan → Ram>Mohan. Follows.

hi.question: राम>श्याम। श्याम>मोहन। निष्कर्ष: राम>मोहन।

en.question: Statement: All metals expand on heating. Conclusion: Mercury expands on heating.
en.explanation: Mercury is a metal (liquid metal). All metals expand → mercury expands. Follows.

hi.question: सभी धातुएँ गर्म करने पर फैलती। निष्कर्ष: पारा फैलता।

en.question: No A is B. Some B are C. I. Some C are not A. II. No C is A.
en.explanation: Some B are C, no A is B. Those C that are B are not A. So Some C are not A (I). II too strong.

hi.question: कोई A,B नहीं। कुछ B,C। I,II?

en.question: Statement: India is the largest democracy. Conclusion: India has elections.
en.explanation: Democracy implies elections. Follows.

hi.question: भारत सबसे बड़ा लोकतंत्र। निष्कर्ष: भारत में चुनाव होते।

en.question: Some chairs are tables. All tables are furniture. No furniture is tree. I. Some chairs are furniture. II. No chair is tree.
en.explanation: Some chairs→tables→furniture → Some chairs are furniture (I). Chairs that are tables are furniture and not trees, but other chairs could be trees. II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कुछ कुर्सियाँ मेज। सभी मेज फर्नीचर। कोई फर्नीचर पेड़ नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: All squares are rectangles. Conclusion: A square has four sides.
en.explanation: All rectangles have 4 sides, squares are rectangles, so square has 4 sides. Follows.

hi.question: सभी वर्ग आयत। निष्कर्ष: वर्ग की चार भुजाएँ।

en.question: All P are Q. All Q are R. Some R are S. No S is T. I. Some P are S. II. No Q is T.
en.explanation: P⊂Q⊂R. Some R are S, no S is T. P may not be in S (I doesn't follow). Q may or may not be in S, and thus may be T if not in S. II doesn't follow. Neither.

hi.question: सभी P,Q। सभी Q,R। कुछ R,S। कोई S,T नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: Mumbai is in Maharashtra. Maharashtra is in India. Conclusion: Mumbai is in India.
en.explanation: Transitivity of location. Follows.

hi.question: मुंबई महाराष्ट्र में। महाराष्ट्र भारत में। निष्कर्ष: मुंबई भारत में।

en.question: All A are B. All B are C. I. Some C are A.
en.explanation: A⊂B⊂C. All A are C, so Some C are A (I).

hi.question: सभी A,B। सभी B,C। I. कुछ C,A।

en.question: Statement: Green plants perform photosynthesis. Cactus is green. Conclusion: Cactus performs photosynthesis.
en.explanation: Cactus is a green plant. Green plants photosynthesize. So cactus photosynthesizes. Follows.

hi.question: हरे पौधे प्रकाश-संश्लेषण करते। कैक्टस हरा। निष्कर्ष: कैक्टस प्रकाश-संश्लेषण करता।

en.question: No teacher is student. Some students are researchers. I. Some researchers are not teachers.
en.explanation: Some students are researchers. No teacher is student. Those researchers that are students are not teachers. Some researchers are not teachers. Follows.

hi.question: कोई शिक्षक छात्र नहीं। कुछ छात्र शोधकर्ता। I. कुछ शोधकर्ता शिक्षक नहीं।

en.question: Statement: The Sun rises in the East. Conclusion: The Sun sets in the West.
en.explanation: While scientifically true, it doesn't logically follow from the statement alone. By common knowledge it does.

hi.question: सूर्य पूर्व में उगता। निष्कर्ष: सूर्य पश्चिम में डूबता।

en.question: Some boys are students. All students are hardworking. I. Some boys are hardworking.
en.explanation: Some boys→students→hardworking. Some boys are hardworking (I).

hi.question: कुछ लड़के छात्र। सभी छात्र मेहनती। I. कुछ लड़के मेहनती।

en.question: Statement: If it rains, match will be cancelled. It is raining. Conclusion: Match is cancelled.
en.explanation: Conditional: If P then Q. P is true. So Q is true (modus ponens). Follows.

hi.question: यदि बारिश, मैच रद्द। बारिश हो रही। निष्कर्ष: मैच रद्द।
hi.explanation: यदि P तो Q, P सत्य। Q सत्य। अनुसरण।

en.question: All roses are flowers. Some flowers fade quickly. I. Some roses fade quickly.
en.explanation: Roses subset flowers. Quick-fading flowers may not include roses. Does not follow.

hi.question: सभी गुलाब फूल। कुछ फूल जल्दी मुरझाते। I. कुछ गुलाब जल्दी मुरझाते।
hi.explanation: गुलाबों का मुरझाने वालों से संबंध निश्चित नहीं।

en.question: Statement: A cat is an animal. Conclusion: All animals are cats.
en.explanation: Reverse not true. One cat being animal doesn't make all animals cats. Does not follow.

hi.question: बिल्ली जानवर। निष्कर्ष: सभी जानवर बिल्ली।

en.question: Some A are B. All B are C. No C is D. I. Some A are not D. II. No A is D.
en.explanation: Some A→B→C, no C is D. Those A are not D. Some A are not D (I). Other A may be D. II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कुछ A,B। सभी B,C। कोई C,D नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Statement: 7 is a prime number. Conclusion: 7 has exactly 2 factors.
en.explanation: Prime numbers have exactly 2 factors (1 and itself). Follows.

hi.question: 7 अभाज्य। निष्कर्ष: 7 के ठीक 2 गुणनखंड।

en.question: All humans are mortal. Socrates is human. Conclusion: Socrates is mortal.
en.explanation: Classic syllogism. Follows.

hi.question: सभी मनुष्य नश्वर। सुकरात मनुष्य। निष्कर्ष: सुकरात नश्वर।

en.question: No fish is mammal. Some sea creatures are fish. I. Some sea creatures are not mammals.
en.explanation: Some sea creatures are fish, no fish is mammal. Those sea creatures (fish) are not mammals. Some sea creatures are not mammals. Follows.

hi.question: कोई मछली स्तनपायी नहीं। कुछ समुद्री जीव मछली। I. कुछ समुद्री जीव स्तनपायी नहीं।

en.question: Statement: Team A scored 300 runs. Team B scored 250. Conclusion: Team A won.
en.explanation: In cricket, more runs = win (assuming completed match). Follows under that assumption.

hi.question: टीम A 300 रन। टीम B 250 रन। निष्कर्ष: A जीती।

en.question: All apples are fruits. Some fruits are red. I. Some apples are red.
en.explanation: Red fruits may not include apples. Does not follow.

hi.question: सभी सेब फल। कुछ फल लाल। I. कुछ सेब लाल।

en.question: Statement: The glass is half full. Conclusion: The glass is half empty.
en.explanation: Half full = half empty, logically equivalent. Follows.

hi.question: गिलास आधा भरा। निष्कर्ष: गिलास आधा खाली।

en.question: All A are B. Some B are C. All C are D. No D is E. I. Some B are not E.
en.explanation: Some B are C, C⊂D, no D is E. Those B that are C are D and not E. Some B are not E (I). Only I.

hi.question: सभी A,B। कुछ B,C। सभी C,D। कोई D,E नहीं। I. कुछ B,E नहीं।

en.question: Statement: Earth revolves around Sun. Conclusion: Sun revolves around Earth.
en.explanation: Reverse is false. Does not follow.

hi.question: पृथ्वी सूर्य की परिक्रमा। निष्कर्ष: सूर्य पृथ्वी की परिक्रमा।

en.question: Some doctors are surgeons. All surgeons are specialists. I. Some doctors are specialists.
en.explanation: Some doctors→surgeons→specialists. Some doctors are specialists. Follows.

hi.question: कुछ डॉक्टर सर्जन। सभी सर्जन विशेषज्ञ। I. कुछ डॉक्टर विशेषज्ञ।

en.question: Statement: All circles are ellipses with zero eccentricity. Conclusion: A circle is a special case of ellipse.
en.explanation: By definition, circle is ellipse with eccentricity=0. Follows.

hi.question: सभी वृत्त शून्य उत्केंद्रता वाले दीर्घवृत्त। निष्कर्ष: वृत्त दीर्घवृत्त का विशेष रूप।

en.question: No A is B. All B are C. I. Some C are not A.
en.explanation: All B are C, no A is B. Those C that are B are not A. Some C are not A (I). II too strong.

hi.question: कोई A,B नहीं। सभी B,C। I. कुछ C,A नहीं।

en.question: Statement: Water freezes at 0°C. Conclusion: Ice melts at 0°C.
en.explanation: Same temperature for phase change. Freezing point = melting point. Follows.

hi.question: पानी 0°C पर जमता। निष्कर्ष: बर्फ 0°C पर पिघलती।

en.question: Some A are B. All B are C. No C is D. Some D are E. I. Some A are C. II. Some B are not D. III. Some E are not C.
en.explanation: I: Some A→B→C, Some A are C (follows). II: All B are C, no C is D, so no B is D, hence Some B are not D (follows). III: Some D are E, no C is D. Those E that are D are not C, so Some E are not C (follows). All three follow.

hi.question: कुछ A,B। सभी B,C। कोई C,D नहीं। कुछ D,E। I,II,III?

en.question:
Statement: All students passed the exam.
Conclusion: Toppers got high marks.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: Probable. Passing doesn't guarantee high marks, but likely.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी छात्र परीक्षा में उत्तीर्ण हुए।
निष्कर्ष: Toppers got high marks.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: Probable. Passing doesn't guarantee high marks, but likely.

en.question:
Statement: All students passed the exam.
Conclusion: No student failed.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. All passed = no failure.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी छात्र परीक्षा में उत्तीर्ण हुए।
निष्कर्ष: No student failed.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: True. All passed = no failure.

en.question:
Statement: All students passed the exam.
Conclusion: Some students failed.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Statement says all passed.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी छात्र परीक्षा में उत्तीर्ण हुए।
निष्कर्ष: Some students failed.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: False. Statement says all passed.

en.question:
Statement: Ram is taller than Shyam, and Shyam is taller than Hari.
Conclusion: Ram is the tallest.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. Ram > Shyam > Hari, so Ram is tallest.

hi.question:
कथन: राम, श्याम से लंबा है और श्याम, हरि से लंबा है।
निष्कर्ष: Ram is the tallest.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: True. Ram > Shyam > Hari, so Ram is tallest.

en.question:
Statement: All birds fly. Parrot is a bird.
Conclusion: Parrot cannot fly.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Contradicts.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी पक्षी उड़ते हैं। तोता एक पक्षी है।
निष्कर्ष: Parrot cannot fly.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?

en.question:
Statement: India is a democratic country. Democracies have elected governments.
Conclusion: All countries are democratic.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Overgeneralization.

hi.question:
कथन: भारत एक लोकतांत्रिक देश है। लोकतंत्रों में निर्वाचित सरकार होती है।
निष्कर्ष: All countries are democratic.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?

en.question:
Statement: All birds fly. Parrot is a bird.
Conclusion: Parrot flies.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. Deductive: All birds fly, parrot is bird → parrot flies.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी पक्षी उड़ते हैं। तोता एक पक्षी है।
निष्कर्ष: Parrot flies.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: True. Deductive: All birds fly, parrot is bird → parrot flies.

en.question:
Statement: Ram is taller than Shyam, and Shyam is taller than Hari.
Conclusion: Hari is taller than Ram.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Contradicts premises.

hi.question:
कथन: राम, श्याम से लंबा है और श्याम, हरि से लंबा है।
निष्कर्ष: Hari is taller than Ram.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?

en.question:
Statement: India is a democratic country. Democracies have elected governments.
Conclusion: India has an elected government.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. India is democratic → has elected government.

hi.question:
कथन: भारत एक लोकतांत्रिक देश है। लोकतंत्रों में निर्वाचित सरकार होती है।
निष्कर्ष: India has an elected government.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: True. India is democratic → has elected government.

en.question:
Statement: India is a democratic country. Democracies have elected governments.
Conclusion: India has a monarchy.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Democracies don't have monarchs.

hi.question:
कथन: भारत एक लोकतांत्रिक देश है। लोकतंत्रों में निर्वाचित सरकार होती है।
निष्कर्ष: India has a monarchy.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: False. Democracies don't have monarchs.

en.question:
Statement: Ram is taller than Shyam, and Shyam is taller than Hari.
Conclusion: Shyam's height is average.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. No data about average.

hi.question:
कथन: राम, श्याम से लंबा है और श्याम, हरि से लंबा है।
निष्कर्ष: Shyam's height is average.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: False. No data about average.

en.question:
Statement: All birds fly. Parrot is a bird.
Conclusion: Some birds do not fly.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. Statement says ALL birds fly.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी पक्षी उड़ते हैं। तोता एक पक्षी है।
निष्कर्ष: Some birds do not fly.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: False. Statement says ALL birds fly.

en.question:
Statement: All students passed the exam.
Conclusion: The exam was easy.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: Probable. 100% pass rate suggests ease, but not conclusive.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी छात्र परीक्षा में उत्तीर्ण हुए।
निष्कर्ष: The exam was easy.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: Probable. 100% pass rate suggests ease, but not conclusive.

en.question:
Statement: All birds fly. Parrot is a bird.
Conclusion: All flying things are birds.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: False. All birds fly ≠ all fliers are birds.

hi.question:
कथन: सभी पक्षी उड़ते हैं। तोता एक पक्षी है।
निष्कर्ष: All flying things are birds.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: False. All birds fly ≠ all fliers are birds.

en.question:
Statement: India is a democratic country. Democracies have elected governments.
Conclusion: Elections are held in India.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. Elected government implies elections.

hi.question:
कथन: भारत एक लोकतांत्रिक देश है। लोकतंत्रों में निर्वाचित सरकार होती है।
निष्कर्ष: Elections are held in India.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?
hi.explanation: निष्कर्ष: True. Elected government implies elections.

en.question:
Statement: Ram is taller than Shyam, and Shyam is taller than Hari.
Conclusion: Hari is the shortest.
Does the conclusion follow?
en.explanation: Conclusion: True. Hari < Shyam < Ram.

hi.question:
कथन: राम, श्याम से लंबा है और श्याम, हरि से लंबा है।
निष्कर्ष: Hari is the shortest.
क्या निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करता है?

en.question: What is 23 × 11?
What is 22 × 26?
What is 14 × 10?
What is 42 × 26?
What is 26 × 34?
What is 48 × 6?
What is 43 × 29?
What is 45 × 18?
What is 18 × 4?

What is 18 × 25?
